requirement_topic.en: ANOR PECAE Pre-Shipment Conformity — Grid-Connection and Anti-Islanding (IEC 62116, IEC 61727) for 230/400 V, 50 Hz
requirement_topic.zh: ANOR PECAE装运前合格评定——并网与防孤岛（IEC 62116、IEC 61727）230/400 V 50 Hz
requirement_topic.zht: ANOR PECAE裝運前合格評定——併網與防孤島（IEC 62116、IEC 61727）230/400 V 50 Hz

summary.en: Cameroon's national standards body ANOR (Agence des Normes et de la Qualité) administers the PECAE programme (Programme d'Évaluation de la Conformité Avant Embarquement — Pre-Shipment Conformity Assessment Programme). Under PECAE, regulated electrical and electronic products, including solar PV equipment, require a Certificate of Conformity (CoC) issued by an ANOR-appointed inspection body before export to Cameroon. ANOR adopts IEC standards as its primary technical reference for PV equipment. For grid-connected PV inverters, the relevant IEC grid standards are: IEC 62116 (Utility-interconnected photovoltaic inverters — Test procedure of islanding prevention measures), requiring inverters to detect loss of mains and disconnect within 2 seconds maximum; and IEC 61727 (Photovoltaic systems — Characteristics of the utility interface), which sets interface requirements including voltage and frequency operating windows. Cameroon's national grid operates at 230 V single-phase and 400 V three-phase at 50 Hz (ENEO / SONATREL distribution and transmission network). Inverter firmware protection thresholds and reconnection delays must be validated for Cameroon's 230/400 V, 50 Hz grid, not the 220/380 V, 50 Hz settings used in China under GB/T 156.
summary.zh: 喀麦隆国家标准机构ANOR（Agence des Normes et de la Qualité，质量与标准署）负责管理PECAE计划（Programme d'Évaluation de la Conformité Avant Embarquement，装运前合格评定计划）。根据PECAE规定，受监管的电气和电子产品（包括太阳能光伏设备）在出口至喀麦隆前，须由ANOR指定检验机构颁发合格证书（CoC）。ANOR以IEC标准为光伏设备主要技术参考依据。对于并网光伏逆变器，相关IEC并网标准包括：IEC 62116（并网光伏逆变器——防孤岛措施测试程序），要求逆变器在最长2秒内检测电网失电并断开；以及IEC 61727（光伏系统——公用接口特性），规定包括电压和频率运行窗口在内的接口要求。喀麦隆国家电网运行参数为单相230 V、三相400 V、50 Hz（ENEO/SONATREL配电和输电网络）。逆变器固件保护阈值和重连延迟须针对喀麦隆230/400 V、50 Hz电网进行验证，而非中国依据GB/T 156使用的220/380 V、50 Hz参数。
summary.zht: 喀麥隆國家標準機構ANOR（Agence des Normes et de la Qualité，品質與標準署）負責管理PECAE計畫（Programme d'Évaluation de la Conformité Avant Embarquement，裝運前合格評定計畫）。根據PECAE規定，受監管的電氣和電子產品（包括太陽能光伏設備）在出口至喀麥隆前，須由ANOR指定檢驗機構頒發合格證書（CoC）。ANOR以IEC標準為光伏設備主要技術參考依據。對於併網光伏逆變器，相關IEC併網標準包括：IEC 62116（併網光伏逆變器——防孤島措施測試程序），要求逆變器在最長2秒內偵測電網失電並斷開；以及IEC 61727（光伏系統——公用接口特性），規定包括電壓和頻率運行窗口在內的接口要求。喀麥隆國家電網運行參數為單相230 V、三相400 V、50 Hz（ENEO/SONATREL配電和輸電網絡）。逆變器韌體保護閾值和重連延遲須針對喀麥隆230/400 V、50 Hz電網進行驗證，而非中國依據GB/T 156使用的220/380 V、50 Hz參數。

standards_or_laws: IEC 62116 — Utility-interconnected photovoltaic inverters — Test procedure of islanding prevention measures (IEC standard adopted by ANOR as technical reference for PV conformity)
IEC 61727 — Photovoltaic (PV) systems — Characteristics of the utility interface (IEC standard adopted by ANOR)
ANOR PECAE — Programme d'Évaluation de la Conformité Avant Embarquement (Cameroon pre-shipment conformity assessment programme)
ARSEL sector regulation — licensing requirements for grid-connected power generation and distribution installations in Cameroon
ENEO / SONATREL grid parameters — 230 V single-phase, 400 V three-phase, 50 Hz (Cameroon national grid)

summary.en: Chinese grid-connection evidence commonly provided includes GB/T 19964-2024 (Technical Requirements for Connecting Photovoltaic Power Station to Power System, applicable to utility-scale PV via 10 kV and above), NB/T 32004 (inverter technical specifications), and domestic anti-islanding test results obtained under Chinese grid conditions. These Chinese grid-connection documents are based on China's domestic grid parameters (220/380 V, 50 Hz under GB/T 156) and are not accepted by ANOR as equivalent to IEC 62116 or IEC 61727 type-test evidence for PECAE conformity purposes. The voltage difference between China (220/380 V) and Cameroon (230/400 V) at the same 50 Hz frequency means firmware protection thresholds validated for Chinese grid conditions must be re-parameterised and retested for Cameroon's grid.
summary.zh: 中国通常提供的并网证据包括GB/T 19964-2024（光伏发电站接入电力系统技术规定，适用于通过10 kV及以上接入的大型光伏电站）、NB/T 32004（逆变器技术规范）及在中国电网条件下取得的国内防孤岛测试结果。上述中国并网文件基于中国国内电网参数（依据GB/T 156为220/380 V、50 Hz），不被ANOR接受为IEC 62116或IEC 61727型式试验证据的等效依据，不用于PECAE合格评定。中国（220/380 V）与喀麦隆（230/400 V）在相同50 Hz频率下的电压差异，意味着针对中国电网条件验证的固件保护阈值须重新参数化并针对喀麦隆电网重新测试。
summary.zht: 中國通常提供的併網證據包括GB/T 19964-2024（光伏發電站接入電力系統技術規定，適用於通過10 kV及以上接入的大型光伏電站）、NB/T 32004（逆變器技術規範）及在中國電網條件下取得的國內防孤島測試結果。上述中國併網文件基於中國國內電網參數（依據GB/T 156為220/380 V、50 Hz），不被ANOR接受為IEC 62116或IEC 61727型式試驗證據的等效依據，不用於PECAE合格評定。中國（220/380 V）與喀麥隆（230/400 V）在相同50 Hz頻率下的電壓差異，意味著針對中國電網條件驗證的韌體保護閾值須重新參數化並針對喀麥隆電網重新測試。

standards_or_laws: GB/T 19964-2024 — 光伏发电站接入电力系统技术规定 (Technical Requirements for Connecting Photovoltaic Power Station to Power System)
GB/T 156 — 标准电压 (Standard voltages) — China domestic grid: 220/380 V at 50 Hz
NB/T 32004-2018 — 光伏并网逆变器技术规范 (Technical Specification for Photovoltaic Grid-Connected Inverters)

gap.en: Gap: Chinese GB/T grid-connection documents do not satisfy ANOR PECAE conformity requirements for Cameroon. For grid-tied PV inverters, exporters must prepare: (a) IEC 62116 anti-islanding type-test report from an ILAC-accredited laboratory; (b) IEC 61727 interface compliance evidence; (c) firmware protection thresholds and reconnection delays validated for Cameroon's 230/400 V, 50 Hz grid — not the 220/380 V China grid parameters; (d) ARSEL sector licensing confirmation for the installation; (e) ENEO grid-connection approval for distribution-level projects. For off-grid or mini-grid projects (common under Cameroon's AER rural electrification programme or donor-funded schemes), grid-connection approvals may be replaced by donor/lender technical specifications (AfDB, World Bank, EU), which typically reference IEC standards independently and require ILAC-accredited test evidence. Where inverter firmware settings differ from the China factory default, re-parameterisation must be documented and, if the change is material, retested under the applicable IEC standard.
gap.zh: 差距：中国GB/T并网文件不满足喀麦隆ANOR PECAE合格评定要求。对于并网光伏逆变器，出口商须准备：（a）来自ILAC认可实验室的IEC 62116防孤岛型式试验报告；（b）IEC 61727接口合规证据；（c）针对喀麦隆230/400 V、50 Hz电网验证的固件保护阈值和重连延迟——而非中国220/380 V电网参数；（d）装置的ARSEL行业许可确认；（e）配电层面项目的ENEO并网批准。对于离网或微电网项目（常见于喀麦隆AER农村电气化计划或捐助方资助项目），并网批准可能由捐助方/贷款方技术规格（非洲开发银行、世界银行、欧盟）替代，这些规格通常独立引用IEC标准并要求ILAC认可测试证据。若逆变器固件设置与中国出厂默认设置不同，须记录重新参数化过程，如变更重要，应依据适用IEC标准重新测试。
gap.zht: 差距：中國GB/T併網文件不滿足喀麥隆ANOR PECAE合格評定要求。對於併網光伏逆變器，出口商須準備：（a）來自ILAC認可實驗室的IEC 62116防孤島型式試驗報告；（b）IEC 61727接口合規證據；（c）針對喀麥隆230/400 V、50 Hz電網驗證的韌體保護閾值和重連延遲——而非中國220/380 V電網參數；（d）裝置的ARSEL行業許可確認；（e）配電層面項目的ENEO併網批准。對於離網或微電網項目（常見於喀麥隆AER農村電氣化計畫或捐助方資助項目），併網批准可能由捐助方/貸款方技術規格（非洲開發銀行、世界銀行、歐盟）替代，這些規格通常獨立引用IEC標準並要求ILAC認可測試證據。若逆變器韌體設置與中國出廠預設設置不同，須記錄重新參數化過程，如變更重要，應依據適用IEC標準重新測試。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory: ANOR PECAE CoC required before export for regulated electrical products; ARSEL licensing required for grid-tied installations; ENEO grid-connection approval required for distribution-level projects. Donor/lender-funded projects carry additional IEC-referenced technical requirements independent of ANOR/ARSEL.
mandatory_status.cn: Chinese GB/T grid-connection evidence satisfies China's domestic grid operator requirements but does not transfer to Cameroon ANOR PECAE, ARSEL, or ENEO grid-connection acceptance.

source.publisher: ANOR — Agence des Normes et de la Qualité (Cameroon National Standards Body)

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Cameroon requires ANOR PECAE pre-shipment conformity (IEC-referenced evidence) before export, ARSEL sector licensing for grid-tied installations, and ENEO grid-connection approval for distribution-level projects. Chinese GB/T grid certificates do not satisfy any of these gates. Re-parameterise inverter firmware for Cameroon's 230/400 V, 50 Hz grid and obtain IEC 62116 and IEC 61727 type-test reports from an ILAC-accredited laboratory before shipment. For donor/lender-funded mini-grid or solar projects, verify IEC certification requirements in the specific procurement specification before committing equipment.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 喀麦隆要求出口前取得ANOR PECAE装运前合格评定（IEC参考证据）、并网装置须取得ARSEL行业许可，以及配电层面项目须取得ENEO并网批准。中国GB/T并网证书不满足上述任何门槛。出货前须将逆变器固件重新参数化为喀麦隆230/400 V、50 Hz电网参数，并从ILAC认可实验室取得IEC 62116和IEC 61727型式试验报告。对于捐助方/贷款方资助的微电网或太阳能项目，在确定设备前，请核实具体采购规格中的IEC认证要求。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 喀麥隆要求出口前取得ANOR PECAE裝運前合格評定（IEC參考證據）、併網裝置須取得ARSEL行業許可，以及配電層面項目須取得ENEO併網批准。中國GB/T併網證書不滿足上述任何門檻。出貨前須將逆變器韌體重新參數化為喀麥隆230/400 V、50 Hz電網參數，並從ILAC認可實驗室取得IEC 62116和IEC 61727型式試驗報告。對於捐助方/貸款方資助的微電網或太陽能項目，在確定設備前，請核實具體採購規格中的IEC認證要求。

requirement_topic.en: ARSEL Licensing and ENEO / SONATREL Grid-Connection — Distributed and Utility-Scale PV in Cameroon
requirement_topic.zh: ARSEL许可与ENEO/SONATREL并网——喀麦隆分布式及大型光伏
requirement_topic.zht: ARSEL許可與ENEO/SONATREL併網——喀麥隆分散式及大型光伏

summary.en: ARSEL (Agence de Régulation du Secteur de l'Électricité) is Cameroon's electricity sector regulator and issues licences for power generation, distribution, and sales activities, including grid-connected solar PV installations. ENEO (Energy of Cameroon) is the main distribution concessionaire and manages grid-connection approvals for distribution-level connections; SONATREL (Société Nationale de Transport de l'Électricité) manages the high-voltage transmission network. For grid-connected PV projects — whether distributed rooftop or utility-scale — ARSEL licensing and ENEO connection approval are mandatory regulatory gates. Equipment technical specifications submitted for ARSEL and ENEO review must meet IEC-referenced requirements. Cameroon has a hydro-dominant generation mix (Sanaga basin: Songloulou, Edéa, Lom Pangar), with solar PV primarily deployed through: (a) donor/IPP utility-scale projects (e.g. Scatec, Release Maroua-Guider corridor); (b) AER (Agence d'Électrification Rurale) off-grid and mini-grid rural electrification programmes; (c) C2D / EU-funded decentralised solar schemes. All grid-tied inverters for these categories must carry IEC-conformant documentation acceptable to ARSEL and ENEO.
summary.zh: ARSEL（Agence de Régulation du Secteur de l'Électricité，电力行业监管机构）是喀麦隆电力行业监管机构，负责颁发发电、配电及销售活动（包括并网太阳能光伏装置）的许可证。ENEO（Energy of Cameroon，喀麦隆能源公司）是主要配电特许经营商，管理配电层面的并网批准；SONATREL（Société Nationale de Transport de l'Électricité，国家输电公司）管理高压输电网络。对于并网光伏项目——无论是分布式屋顶还是大型地面电站——ARSEL许可和ENEO并网批准是强制性监管门槛。提交ARSEL和ENEO审查的设备技术规格须符合IEC参考要求。喀麦隆发电以水电为主（萨纳加河流域：松格鲁鲁、埃代阿、隆邦加水电站），太阳能光伏主要通过以下途径部署：（a）捐助方/独立发电商大型项目（如Scatec、Release马鲁阿-吉代尔走廊）；（b）AER（农村电气化署）离网和微电网农村电气化计划；（c）C2D/欧盟资助的分散式太阳能项目。上述各类并网逆变器均须持有ARSEL和ENEO可接受的符合IEC标准的文件。
summary.zht: ARSEL（Agence de Régulation du Secteur de l'Électricité，電力行業監管機構）是喀麥隆電力行業監管機構，負責頒發發電、配電及銷售活動（包括併網太陽能光伏裝置）的許可證。ENEO（Energy of Cameroon，喀麥隆能源公司）是主要配電特許經營商，管理配電層面的併網批准；SONATREL（Société Nationale de Transport de l'Électricité，國家輸電公司）管理高壓輸電網絡。對於併網光伏項目——無論是分散式屋頂還是大型地面電站——ARSEL許可和ENEO併網批准是強制性監管門檻。提交ARSEL和ENEO審查的設備技術規格須符合IEC參考要求。喀麥隆發電以水電為主（薩納加河流域：松格魯魯、埃代阿、隆邦加水電站），太陽能光伏主要透過以下途徑部署：（a）捐助方/獨立發電商大型項目（如Scatec、Release馬魯阿-吉代爾走廊）；（b）AER（農村電氣化署）離網和微電網農村電氣化計畫；（c）C2D/歐盟資助的分散式太陽能項目。上述各類併網逆變器均須持有ARSEL和ENEO可接受的符合IEC標準的文件。

standards_or_laws: ARSEL — Agence de Régulation du Secteur de l'Électricité — Cameroon electricity sector licensing authority
ENEO grid-connection technical requirements — distribution-level connection approvals for solar PV projects in Cameroon
SONATREL — high-voltage transmission network operator — applicable for utility-scale solar above distribution voltage
AER — Agence d'Électrification Rurale — rural electrification programme authority, off-grid and mini-grid solar specifications
IEC 62116 — Anti-islanding test standard referenced in Cameroon IEC-based PV conformity
IEC 61727 — PV system utility interface characteristics

summary.en: China does not have a direct equivalent to Cameroon's ARSEL licensing or ENEO grid-connection approval process. Distributed solar connection in China is governed by National Energy Administration (NEA) distributed PV policies and grid operator (State Grid, Southern Power Grid) connection rules, referencing China domestic standards (NB/T 32004, GB/T 37408, GB/T 19964-2024). Chinese distributed or utility-scale connection approvals under NEA rules are not applicable in Cameroon and do not give any presumption of compliance with ARSEL licensing or ENEO grid-connection technical requirements.
summary.zh: 中国没有与喀麦隆ARSEL许可或ENEO并网批准流程直接对应的制度。中国分布式太阳能并网受国家能源局（NEA）分布式光伏政策及电网运营商（国家电网、南方电网）接入规则管理，引用中国国内标准（NB/T 32004、GB/T 37408、GB/T 19964-2024）。中国依据NEA规则取得的分布式或大型电站并网批准不适用于喀麦隆，不给予ARSEL许可或ENEO并网技术要求的任何合规推定。
summary.zht: 中國沒有與喀麥隆ARSEL許可或ENEO併網批准流程直接對應的制度。中國分散式太陽能併網受國家能源局（NEA）分散式光伏政策及電網運營商（國家電網、南方電網）接入規則管理，引用中國國內標準（NB/T 32004、GB/T 37408、GB/T 19964-2024）。中國依據NEA規則取得的分散式或大型電站併網批准不適用於喀麥隆，不給予ARSEL許可或ENEO併網技術要求的任何合規推定。

standards_or_laws: NB/T 32004-2018 — 光伏并网逆变器技术规范 (Technical Specification for Photovoltaic Grid-Connected Inverters)
GB/T 37408-2021 — 光伏并网逆变器技术要求 (Technical Requirements for Photovoltaic Grid-Connected Inverters)
GB/T 19964-2024 — 光伏发电站接入电力系统技术规定 (Technical Requirements for Connecting Photovoltaic Power Station to Power System)

gap.en: Gap: Chinese inverters for Cameroon grid-connected projects must pass ARSEL sector licensing review and ENEO grid-connection technical approval as separate regulatory gates before commissioning. Chinese grid-connection approvals do not transfer to Cameroon. Confirm inverter IEC compliance evidence (IEC 62116, IEC 61727, IEC 62109-1/-2, IEC 62920), firmware settings validated for 230/400 V at 50 Hz, bilingual (French/English) technical documentation, and equipment eligibility with the relevant ARSEL-licensed contractor and ENEO project review team before committing product. For AER rural electrification or donor-funded mini-grid projects, confirm the applicable technical specification in the project financing or procurement documents — donor requirements may be more stringent than or different from base ARSEL/ENEO requirements.
gap.zh: 差距：用于喀麦隆并网项目的中国逆变器须分别通过ARSEL行业许可审查和ENEO并网技术审批，作为独立监管门槛后方可投入运行。中国并网批准不能转移至喀麦隆。在确定产品前，请与相关ARSEL持牌承包商和ENEO项目审查团队确认逆变器IEC合规证据（IEC 62116、IEC 61727、IEC 62109-1/-2、IEC 62920）、针对230/400 V 50 Hz验证的固件设置、法文/英文双语技术文件及设备资格。对于AER农村电气化或捐助方资助的微电网项目，请在项目融资或采购文件中确认适用技术规格——捐助方要求可能比基本ARSEL/ENEO要求更严格或有所不同。
gap.zht: 差距：用於喀麥隆併網項目的中國逆變器須分別通過ARSEL行業許可審查和ENEO併網技術審批，作為獨立監管門檻後方可投入運行。中國併網批准不能轉移至喀麥隆。在確定產品前，請與相關ARSEL持牌承包商和ENEO項目審查團隊確認逆變器IEC合規證據（IEC 62116、IEC 61727、IEC 62109-1/-2、IEC 62920）、針對230/400 V 50 Hz驗證的韌體設置、法文/英文雙語技術文件及設備資格。對於AER農村電氣化或捐助方資助的微電網項目，請在項目融資或採購文件中確認適用技術規格——捐助方要求可能比基本ARSEL/ENEO要求更嚴格或有所不同。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory: ARSEL licensing and ENEO grid-connection approval are non-negotiable regulatory gates for all grid-connected PV projects in Cameroon; donor/lender technical specifications add additional mandatory IEC requirements for publicly financed projects
mandatory_status.cn: Chinese NEA distributed solar and utility-scale connection approvals are granted under China's domestic regulatory framework — not transferable to Cameroon

source.publisher: ARSEL — Agence de Régulation du Secteur de l'Électricité (Cameroon Electricity Sector Regulatory Agency)

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] ARSEL licensing and ENEO grid-connection approval are separate and mandatory regulatory gates from any Chinese domestic solar approval. Confirm inverter IEC compliance evidence and firmware settings for Cameroon's 230/400 V, 50 Hz grid, and verify ARSEL licensing status and ENEO connection requirements with the project team before submitting equipment for project review. For donor/lender-funded projects, read the specific procurement technical specification — IEC certification requirements may exceed the base ARSEL/ENEO level.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] ARSEL许可和ENEO并网批准是独立于任何中国国内太阳能批准的强制性监管门槛。在提交设备进行项目审查前，请确认逆变器IEC合规证据和喀麦隆230/400 V、50 Hz电网固件设置，并与项目团队核实ARSEL许可状态和ENEO并网要求。对于捐助方/贷款方资助的项目，请阅读具体采购技术规格——IEC认证要求可能超过基本ARSEL/ENEO水平。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] ARSEL許可和ENEO併網批准是獨立於任何中國國內太陽能批准的強制性監管門檻。在提交設備進行項目審查前，請確認逆變器IEC合規證據和喀麥隆230/400 V、50 Hz電網韌體設置，並與項目團隊核實ARSEL許可狀態和ENEO併網要求。對於捐助方/貸款方資助的項目，請閱讀具體採購技術規格——IEC認證要求可能超過基本ARSEL/ENEO水平。
